articles.title: Big Pharma Buried Alzheimer's Cures to Protect $360 Billion Disease Industry
articles.summary: Mercola exposes how pharmaceutical giants systematically suppress effective Alzheimer's treatments and root cause research to maintain their massive profit machine. Despite billions spent on failed drugs, real solutions addressing forgotten causes remain buried in the medical literature.

articles.title: Big Pharma Wages War Against Anti-Inflammatory Superfoods That Threaten Patent Profits
articles.summary: The medical-pharmaceutical complex systematically suppresses turmeric and other natural anti-inflammatory compounds because their curcuminoids can't be patented for massive profits. These superfoods target multiple disease pathways but are dismissed to protect synthetic drug monopolies.

articles.title: Ozempic's Hidden Suicide Risk: 45% Spike in Self-Harm Ideation Buried by Regulators
articles.summary: WHO data reveals semaglutide (Ozempic/Wegovy) increases suicidal ideation by 45%, but this devastating psychiatric side effect remains buried while the drug is pushed for widespread weight loss. The suicide signal was there all along — regulators just ignored it.

articles.title: The Hemp Conspiracy: DuPont and Big Pharma Destroyed Medicine Cabinet's Most Powerful Plant
articles.summary: Hemp was systematically criminalized in 1937 not for health reasons, but because synthetic fiber corporations like DuPont saw it as competition. The 1970 Controlled Substances Act falsely classified it as having 'no medical use' to protect pharmaceutical monopolies.

articles.title: Russell Vought's War on Academic Science: OMB Rule Will Destroy Independent Research
articles.summary: New OMB federal funding rules under Russell Vought threaten to completely destroy American scientific independence by prohibiting funding mechanisms that allow researchers to operate outside direct government control. This is naked political interference in scientific research.

articles.title: Replication Crisis Exposes ESG Science as Built on 'Throne of Lies'
articles.summary: John Ioannidis and fellow academics reveal how decades of unreproducible research has created a foundation of false knowledge propping up entire policy frameworks. The replication crisis isn't just about bad science — it's about systematic institutional fraud.
